response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip for the Hololive 1st Generation 7th Anniversary, featuring the song '電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言' (Cyber Pure Love Declaration) performed by the 1st Generation members. The video alternates between a static promotional image and a short, looping dance animation set to the song.

scenes.description: A static promotional graphic for the Hololive 1st Generation 7th Anniversary is displayed. The text on-screen reads '1st generation 電脳ぴゃあ推し大宣言' and '7周年記念!'.
scenes.song_title: 電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言 (Cyber Pure Love Declaration)
